headline: Umicore - Transparency notification by JP Morgan Asset Management Holdings Inc.
summary: Transparency notification byJP Morgan Asset Management Holdings Inc. In accordance with article 14, § 1 of the law of 2 May 2007 on the disclosure of major holdings, Umicore was recently notified by JP Morgan Asset Management Holdings Inc. that its subsidiary, JP Morgan Asset Management (UK) Limited, has crossed the legal threshold of 3% for the direct voting rights and equivalent financial instruments downwards on 15 June 2026. headline: Morningstar (MORN) Teams Up With Apollo, Franklin Templeton, And JPMorgan On New Models
summary: Morningstar Wealth is working with Apollo, Franklin Templeton, and JPMorgan to launch research-driven public and private market model portfolios. The collaboration focuses on giving financial advisors access to diversified portfolios that include private market exposure through interval funds. The new models are designed to combine Morningstar's independent research with open-architecture allocations from multiple asset managers. Morningstar (NasdaqGS:MORN) is moving deeper into portfolio...

headline: JPMorgan latest Broadcom outlook sends key signal
